features: HARDWORKING SKINCARE: O'Keeffe's Lip Repair's highly effective formula relieves, hydrates and helps repair extremely dry lips to leave them feeling soft, smooth and healthy all day long.
ALL DAY MOISTURE: Lip Repair provides instant relief and all-day moisture in just one use.
PROTECTIVE LAYER: Creates a protective flexible barrier to help protect against dryness all day, even while you eat and drink.

GUARANTEED RELIEF: We know you’ll love our products, but if you are dissatisfied for any reason, we will refund your purchase with a voucher of equivalent value (terms and conditions apply). Visit our website to make a claim and for further information.
description: Product Description O'Keeffe's Lip Repair’s highly effective formula relieves, hydrates and helps repair extremely dry lips to leave them feeling soft, smooth and healthy all day long. Offering long-lasting hydration for up to 24 hours, O'Keeffe's Lip Repair is clinically proven to work with just one application. With seven moisturisers and conditioners, O’Keeffe’s Lip Repair continues to work throughout eating and drinking. For best results, apply O’Keeffe’s Lip Repair to lips in the morning and enjoy intense hydration and protection all day long. Available in Unscented, Cooling Relief or SPF. Ingredients Beeswax, Dimethicone, Petrolatum, Hydrogenated Polydecene, Phenyl Trimethicone, Trimethylpentanediol/Adipic Acid/Glycerin Crosspolymer, Butyrospermum Parkii BUTTER, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet ALMOND) Oil, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Mentha Piperita Oil, Polysilicone-11, Ethylene/Propylene/Styrene Copolymer, Sodium Saccharin, Butylene/Ethylene/Styrene Copolymer, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-Di-T-Butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Limonene, Linalool Directions Apply a thin layer to lips for immediate relief and long-lasting hydration. Safety Warning For External Use Only See more
